title: oreogrammitis cheesemanii
intro: Oreogrammitis cheesemanii, also known as the Cheeseman's fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Oreogrammitis cheesemanii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and preventing the growth of certain bacteria. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
